name: hold_vs_sell
description: Compare the NPV of continuing to hold a hotel property versus selling it now. Analyzes projected NOI growth, terminal value, debt payoff, tax implications (capital gains and depreciation recapture), and commission costs to determine the economically optimal decision.

noi_growth_rate.description: Expected annual NOI growth rate as decimal (e.g. 0.03 = 3%)

current_market_value.description: Current estimated market value of the property

exit_cap_rate.description: Cap rate for current sale valuation as decimal

future_exit_cap_rate.description: Expected cap rate at future sale (defaults to exit_cap_rate if omitted)

remaining_hold_years.description: Number of additional years to model holding

discount_rate.description: Discount rate for NPV calculation as decimal

outstanding_debt.description: Outstanding loan balance to be repaid at sale

annual_capex.description: Annual capital expenditure deducted from hold cash flows

annual_debt_service.description: Annual debt service during hold period

original_cost_basis.description: Original purchase price for capital gains calculation

capital_gains_rate.description: Capital gains tax rate as decimal

depreciation_recapture_rate.description: Depreciation recapture tax rate as decimal (typically 0.25)
